name: rimworld-modder-mcp
description: Comprehensive MCP server for RimWorld mod analysis, validation, and compact modding workflows
long_description: A high-performance C#/.NET MCP server for RimWorld defs, patches, compatibility analysis, balance inspection, and token-aware modding workflows. It focuses on loaded XML and patch data, with compact tools for readiness checks, DLC compatibility scans, Player.log triage, patch hotspots, and coverage reporting.

tools.name: get_def
tools.description: Get a specific RimWorld definition by name

tools.name: get_defs_by_type
tools.description: Get all definitions of a specific type (e.g. ThingDef, PawnKindDef)

tools.name: search_defs
tools.description: Search for definitions containing a specific term in their name or content

tools.name: get_mod_list
tools.description: Get list of all loaded mods with their information and load order

tools.name: get_statistics
tools.description: Get comprehensive statistics about loaded data including mod counts, def counts, loading status

tools.name: get_conflicts
tools.description: Get mod conflicts with optional filtering by mod, type, or severity

tools.name: get_references
tools.description: Find all references to a specific definition (what uses this item/pawn/etc.)

tools.name: analyze_load_order
tools.description: Analyze mod load order and suggest optimizations

tools.name: get_dependency_tree
tools.description: Show mod dependencies and conflicts in tree format

tools.name: validate_xml
tools.description: Validate XML definitions for syntax and schema errors

tools.name: get_def_inheritance_tree
tools.description: Show the complete inheritance chain for a definition

tools.name: get_patches_for_def
tools.description: Get all patches that modify a specific definition

tools.name: validate_def
tools.description: Check if a definition follows proper XML schema/rules

tools.name: get_def_dependencies
tools.description: Find what other defs this definition references

tools.name: compare_defs
tools.description: Compare two definitions and show differences

tools.name: get_abstract_defs
tools.description: Get all abstract definitions that can be inherited from

tools.name: analyze_mod_compatibility
tools.description: Deep compatibility analysis between specific mods

tools.name: get_mod_dependencies
tools.description: Show mod dependency tree and load order requirements

tools.name: find_broken_references
tools.description: Find broken references in mod XMLs

tools.name: validate_mod_structure
tools.description: Check if mod follows proper directory/file structure

tools.name: get_patch_conflicts
tools.description: Find conflicting patches between mods

tools.name: trace_patch_application
tools.description: Show how patches are applied to a definition

tools.name: get_patch_performance
tools.description: Analyze patch complexity and performance impact

tools.name: validate_xpath
tools.description: Test XPath expressions against definitions

tools.name: write_xpath
tools.description: Write XPath expressions that target a definition

tools.name: preview_patch
tools.description: Show what a patch would look like in XML format

tools.name: preview_patch_result
tools.description: Show what a definition looks like after patches

tools.name: find_duplicate_content
tools.description: Locate duplicate/redundant definitions

tools.name: suggest_optimizations
tools.description: Recommend performance improvements

tools.name: analyze_texture_usage
tools.description: Check texture sizes and formats

tools.name: validate_localization
tools.description: Check translation completeness

tools.name: find_unused_assets
tools.description: Locate unused textures/sounds/etc

tools.name: lint_xml
tools.description: Check XML formatting and common issues

tools.name: generate_documentation
tools.description: Auto-generate mod documentation

tools.name: create_compatibility_report
tools.description: Generate detailed compatibility analysis

tools.name: export_definitions
tools.description: Export filtered definitions to various formats

tools.name: calculate_market_value
tools.description: Compute item market values with all modifiers

tools.name: analyze_balance
tools.description: Compare weapon/item stats across mods

tools.name: get_recipe_chains
tools.description: Show crafting dependency chains

tools.name: find_research_paths
tools.description: Calculate research unlock paths

tools.name: get_biome_compatibility
tools.description: Check what spawns in different biomes

tools.name: calculate_room_requirements
tools.description: Analyze room/building requirements

tools.name: suggest_def_name
tools.description: Suggest proper DefNames following conventions

tools.name: check_naming_conventions
tools.description: Validate naming follows RimWorld patterns

tools.name: find_translation_keys
tools.description: Extract all translatable strings

tools.name: generate_mod_metadata
tools.description: Create proper About.xml and metadata

tools.name: check_version_compatibility
tools.description: Validate against specific RimWorld versions

tools.name: suggest_load_order
tools.description: Recommend optimal mod load order

tools.name: triage_player_log
tools.description: Group RimWorld Player.log issues into compact debugging buckets

tools.name: validate_def_against_runtime
tools.description: Validate a loaded def against parent, reference, and class-like runtime signals

tools.name: scan_dlc_dependencies
tools.description: Scan loaded mods for references to DLC content outside an allowed compatibility target

tools.name: audit_scope
tools.description: Produce a compact audit for a mod, def, def type, or path scope

tools.name: triage_patch_conflicts
tools.description: Group XPath collisions and patch hotspots into compact conflict clusters

tools.name: content_coverage_report
tools.description: Report compact coverage signals for loaded mod content

tools.name: mod_ready_check
tools.description: Run a compact readiness check for one mod or all loaded custom mods

rimworld_path.title: RimWorld Installation Path
rimworld_path.description: Path to your RimWorld installation directory

mod_directories.title: Additional Mod Directories
mod_directories.description: Comma-separated list of additional mod directories to scan (e.g., Workshop directories)

mods_config_path.title: ModsConfig.xml Path
mods_config_path.description: Path to RimWorld's ModsConfig.xml file to filter only enabled mods (usually in %USERPROFILE%\AppData\LocalLow\Ludeon Studios\RimWorld by Ludeon Studios\Config\ModsConfig.xml)

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Logging level for debugging (Debug, Information, Warning, Error)

mod_concurrency.title: Processing Concurrency
mod_concurrency.description: Number of mods to process simultaneously
